privacyNotice.title: Privacy Notice
privacyNotice.firstParagraph: Brandon Uriel Garcia Ramos, better known as imSoft, with an address in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico, and internet portal imsoft.io/privacy-notice, is responsible for the use and protection of your personal data, and in this regard, we inform you of the following:
privacyNotice.firstQuestion: For what purposes will we use your personal data?
privacyNotice.firstAnswer1: The personal data we collect from you will be used for the following purposes that are necessary for the service you request:
privacyNotice.firstAnswer2: Response to messages from the contact form, Provision of any requested service
privacyNotice.secondQuestion: What personal data will we use for these purposes?
privacyNotice.secondAnswer1: To carry out the purposes described in this privacy notice, we will use the following personal data:
privacyNotice.secondAnswer2: Identification and contact data, Employment data
privacyNotice.thirdQuestion: How can you access, rectify, or cancel your personal data, object to its use, or exercise the revocation of consent?
privacyNotice.thirdAnswer1: You have the right to know what personal data we have about you, what we use it for, and the conditions of the use we give it (Access). It is also your right to request the correction of your personal information if it is outdated, inaccurate, or incomplete (Rectification); that we delete it from our records or databases when you consider that it is not being used properly (Cancellation); and to object to the use of your personal data for specific purposes (Opposition). These rights are known as ARCO rights.
privacyNotice.thirdAnswer2: To exercise any of the ARCO rights, you must send a request via email to contacto@imsoft.io and it must contain:
thirdAnswer3: Copy of an attached official ID.
privacyNotice.thirdAnswer4: Description of the purpose of the request, which may include but is not limited to the following: Revocation of consent to process your personal data; and/or Notification of the misuse of your personal data; and/or Exercise of your ARCO Rights, with a clear and precise description of the data to Access, Rectify, Cancel or Oppose. In case of Rectification of personal data, you must indicate the exact modification and attach supporting documentation; it is important in case of revocation of consent that you keep in mind that not in all cases can we address your request or conclude the use immediately, as it is possible that due to a legal obligation we need to continue processing your personal data. Additionally, you should consider that for certain purposes, revocation of your consent will imply that we cannot continue providing the service you requested, or the termination of your relationship with us.
privacyNotice.fourthQuestion: How many days will it take to respond to your request?
privacyNotice.fifthQuestion: By what means will we communicate the response to your request?
privacyNotice.sixthQuestion: The use of tracking technologies on our website
privacyNotice.sixthAnswer1: We inform you that on our website we use cookies, web beacons, or other technologies, through which it is possible to monitor your behavior as an internet user, as well as provide you with better service and experience when browsing our site. The personal data we obtain from these tracking technologies are as follows:
privacyNotice.sixthAnswer2: Preferred language of the user, Region where the user is located, User's browser type, User's operating system type, Web pages visited by a user
privacyNotice.sixthAnswer3: These cookies, web beacons, and other technologies can be disabled. To find out how to do this, consult your browser's help menu. Please note that if you disable cookies, you may not be able to access certain personalized functions on our website.
privacyNotice.seventhQuestion: How can you learn about changes to this privacy notice?
privacyNotice.seventhAnswer: This privacy notice may undergo modifications, changes, or updates due to new legal requirements; our own needs based on the products or services we offer; our privacy practices; changes in our business model, or other causes. We are committed to keeping this privacy notice updated on any changes it may undergo, and you can always check for updates on the website imsoft.io/privacy-notice.
privacyNotice.lastUpdate: Last update of this privacy notice: 01/29/2023
